use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons with interactive hover feedback
Dark-themed interface buttons with spotlight effect
Engaging CTA buttons with magnetic cursor-following glow
ai_summary: A gradient button component featuring a dynamic spotlight effect that follows the mouse cursor on hover, creating a magnetic glow interaction. Supports both dark and light themes with smooth transitions and focus states for accessibility. The button has a polished, modern aesthetic suitable for SaaS and dev-tool interfaces.
